message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) - Pre-Election Cross-Section 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0246","justification":"This dataset covers political behaviour and attitudes during the 1972 German federal election, providing insight into voters' views and participation."},{"title":"German Election Study, 1976","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0835","justification":"Comprehensive data collection on political behaviour, attitudes, and electoral decisions in the 1976 German federal election."},{"title":"German National Election Study, 1979 (European Election)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1542","justification":"Focuses on the German electorate's political attitudes and behaviours during the 1979 European elections."},{"title":"Political Values in Germany 1970","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0677","justification":"Dataset analyzing German citizens' political values and attitudes in 1970."},{"title":"Political Attitudes in the Federal Republic (ICPSR 7387) 1970","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0527","justification":"Investigates political attitudes and behaviours of the German population in 1970."},{"title":"Political Attitudes and Participation, Germany 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0818","justification":"Detailed survey focused on political attitudes and participation in the early 1970s in Germany."},{"title":"German Election Study 1976 (Telephone Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0846","justification":"Telephone survey supplement to the 1976 election, capturing contemporary opinions and behaviour."},{"title":"The German Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1980 – including retrospective questions","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1070","justification":"Includes retrospective questions about political behaviour and attitudes during the 1970s."}]}
